creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Hi again,

After some feedback on ports@, I've reconsidered removing
files/CHANGES.port.

New patch at [1], it also sets o+w permissions on config files.

Chris

New files:

files/pkg-deinstall.in
files/pkg-install.in

Removed files:

files/rcwarning.txt [ancient and irrelevant]

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/mailscanner-4.83.5__2.patch
